description: Resend is the email platform for developers.

tools.name: api-keys_create
tools.description: Create a new API key. Required: name. Optional: domain_id, permission. Returns the new CreateApiKeyResponse.

params.name: domain_id
params.description: Restrict an API key to send emails only from a specific domain. Only used when the permission is sending_access.

params.name: permission
params.description: The API key can have full access to Resend’s API or be only restricted to send emails. * full_access - Can create, delete, get, and update any resource. * sending_access - Can only send emails.

tools.name: api-keys_delete
tools.description: Remove an existing API key. Required: api_key_id. Returns the DeleteApiKeyResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: api-keys_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of API keys. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of ApiKey.

tools.name: audiences_create
tools.description: Deprecated: Use Segments instead. These endpoints still work, but will be removed in the future. Required: name. Returns the new CreateAudienceResponseSuccess.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the audience you want to create.

tools.name: audiences_delete
tools.description: Deprecated: Use Segments instead. These endpoints still work, but will be removed in the future. Required: id. Returns the RemoveAudienceResponseSuccess. Destructive.

tools.name: audiences_get
tools.description: Deprecated: Use Segments instead. These endpoints still work, but will be removed in the future. Required: id. Returns the GetAudienceResponseSuccess.

tools.name: audiences_list
tools.description: Deprecated: Use Segments instead. These endpoints still work, but will be removed in the future. Returns array of AudiencesListItem.

tools.name: automations_create
tools.description: Create an automation. Required: connections, name, steps. Optional: status (default: disabled). Returns the new CreateAutomationResponse.

params.name: connections
params.description: The connections between steps in the automation graph.

params.name: status
params.description: The initial status of the automation. Defaults to `disabled`.

params.name: steps
params.description: The steps that compose the automation workflow. Must include at least one `trigger` step.

tools.name: automations_delete
tools.description: Delete an automation. Required: automation_id. Returns the DeleteAutomationResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: automations_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single automation. Required: automation_id. Returns the Automation.

tools.name: automations_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of automations. Optional: status, limit, after (plus 1 more). Returns array of AutomationListItem.

tools.name: automations_update
tools.description: Update an automation. Required: automation_id. Optional: connections, name, status (plus 1 more). Returns the updated PatchAutomationResponse.

params.name: connections
params.description: The connections between steps in the automation graph. Must be provided together with `steps`.

params.name: steps
params.description: The steps that compose the automation workflow. Must be provided together with `connections`.

tools.name: automations_runs_get
tools.description: Retrieve a list of automation runs. Required: automation_id. Optional: status, limit, after (plus 1 more). Returns array of AutomationRunListItem.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter runs by status. Comma-separated list of: running, completed, failed, cancelled.

tools.name: automations_runs_get-automations
tools.description: Retrieve a single automation run. Required: automation_id, run_id. Returns the AutomationRun.

params.name: run_id
params.description: The ID of the automation run.

tools.name: automations_stop_create
tools.description: Stop an automation. Required: automation_id. Returns the new StopAutomationResponse.

tools.name: broadcasts_create
tools.description: Create a broadcast. Required: from, segment_id, subject. Optional: audience_id, html, name (plus 6 more). Returns the new CreateBroadcastResponseSuccess.

params.name: audience_id
params.description: Use `segment_id` instead. Unique identifier of the segment this broadcast will be sent to.

params.name: from
params.description: The email address of the sender.

params.name: html
params.description: The HTML version of the message.

params.name: preview_text
params.description: The preview text of the email.

params.name: reply_to
params.description: The email addresses to which replies should be sent.

params.name: scheduled_at
params.description: Schedule time to send the broadcast. Can only be used if `send` is true.

params.name: segment_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the segment this broadcast will be sent to.

params.name: send
params.description: Whether to send the broadcast immediately or keep it as a draft.

params.name: subject
params.description: The subject line of the email.

params.name: text
params.description: The plain text version of the message.

params.name: topic_id
params.description: The topic ID that the broadcast will be scoped to.

tools.name: broadcasts_delete
tools.description: Remove an existing broadcast that is in the draft status. Required: id. Returns the RemoveBroadcastResponseSuccess. Destructive.

tools.name: broadcasts_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single broadcast. Required: id. Returns the GetBroadcastResponseSuccess.

tools.name: broadcasts_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of broadcasts. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of BroadcastsListItem.

tools.name: broadcasts_update
tools.description: Update an existing broadcast. Required: id. Optional: audience_id, from, html (plus 7 more). Returns the updated UpdateBroadcastResponseSuccess.

params.name: audience_id
params.description: Use `segment_id` instead. Unique identifier of the audience this broadcast will be sent to.

params.name: from
params.description: The email address of the sender.

params.name: html
params.description: The HTML version of the message.

params.name: preview_text
params.description: The preview text of the email.

params.name: reply_to
params.description: The email addresses to which replies should be sent.

params.name: segment_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the segment this broadcast will be sent to.

params.name: subject
params.description: The subject line of the email.

params.name: text
params.description: The plain text version of the message.

params.name: topic_id
params.description: The topic ID that the broadcast will be scoped to.

tools.name: broadcasts_send_create
tools.description: Send or schedule a broadcast. Required: id. Optional: scheduled_at. Returns the new SendBroadcastResponseSuccess.

params.name: scheduled_at
params.description: Schedule email to be sent later. The date should be in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: contact-properties_create
tools.description: Create a new contact property. Required: key, type. Optional: fallback_value. Returns the new CreateContactPropertyResponseSuccess.

params.name: fallback_value
params.description: The default value to use when the property is not set for a contact. Must match the type specified in the type field.

params.name: key
params.description: The property key. Max length is 50 characters. Only alphanumeric characters and underscores are allowed.

tools.name: contact-properties_delete
tools.description: Remove an existing contact property. Required: id. Returns the RemoveContactPropertyResponseSuccess. Destructive.

tools.name: contact-properties_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single contact property. Required: id. Returns the GetContactPropertyResponseSuccess.

tools.name: contact-properties_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of contact properties. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of ContactPropertiesListItem.

tools.name: contact-properties_update
tools.description: Update an existing contact property. Required: id. Optional: fallback_value. Returns the updated UpdateContactPropertyResponseSuccess.

params.name: fallback_value
params.description: The default value to use when the property is not set for a contact. Must match the type of the property.

tools.name: contacts_create
tools.description: Create a new contact. Required: email. Optional: audience_id, first_name, last_name (plus 4 more). Returns the new CreateContactResponseSuccess.

params.name: audience_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the audience to which the contact belongs.

params.name: properties
params.description: A map of custom property keys and values to create.

params.name: segments
params.description: Array of segment IDs to add the contact to.

params.name: topics
params.description: Array of topic subscriptions for the contact.

params.name: unsubscribed
params.description: The Contact's global subscription status. If set to true, the contact will be unsubscribed from all Broadcasts.

tools.name: contacts_delete
tools.description: Remove an existing contact by ID or email. Required: id. Returns the RemoveContactResponseSuccess. Destructive.

params.name: id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single contact by ID or email. Required: id. Returns the GetContactResponseSuccess.

params.name: id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of contacts. Optional: segment_id, limit, after (plus 1 more). Returns array of ContactsListItem.

tools.name: contacts_update
tools.description: Update a single contact by ID or email. Required: id. Optional: email, first_name, last_name (plus 2 more). Returns the updated UpdateContactResponseSuccess.

params.name: id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

params.name: properties
params.description: A map of custom property keys and values to update.

params.name: unsubscribed
params.description: The Contact's global subscription status. If set to true, the contact will be unsubscribed from all Broadcasts.

tools.name: contacts_segments_create
tools.description: Add a contact to a segment. Required: contact_id, segment_id. Returns the new AddContactToSegmentResponseSuccess.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_segments_delete
tools.description: Remove a contact from a segment. Required: contact_id, segment_id. Returns the RemoveContactFromSegmentResponseSuccess. Destructive.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_segments_get
tools.description: Retrieve a list of segments for a contact. Required: contact_id. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of SegmentsGetItem.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_topics_get
tools.description: Retrieve topics for a contact. Required: contact_id. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of TopicsGetItem.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: contacts_topics_update
tools.description: Update topics for a contact. Required: contact_id, topics. Returns the updated UpdateContactTopicsResponseSuccess.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The Contact ID or email address.

tools.name: domains_create
tools.description: Create a new domain. Required: name. Optional: capabilities, click_tracking, custom_return_path (plus 4 more). Returns the new CreateDomainResponse.

params.name: capabilities
params.description: Configure the domain capabilities for sending and receiving emails. At least one capability must be enabled.

params.name: click_tracking
params.description: Track clicks within the body of each HTML email.

params.name: custom_return_path
params.description: For advanced use cases, choose a subdomain for the Return-Path address. Defaults to 'send' (i.e., send.yourdomain.tld).

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the domain you want to create.

params.name: open_tracking
params.description: Track the open rate of each email.

params.name: region
params.description: The region where emails will be sent from. Possible values are us-east-1 | eu-west-1 | sa-east-1 | ap-northeast-1

params.name: tls
params.description: TLS mode. Opportunistic attempts secure connection but falls back to unencrypted. Enforced requires TLS or email won't be sent.

params.name: tracking_subdomain
params.description: The subdomain to use for click and open tracking.

tools.name: domains_delete
tools.description: Remove an existing domain. Required: domain_id. Returns the DeleteDomainResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: domains_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single domain. Required: domain_id. Returns the Domain.

tools.name: domains_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of domains. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of ListDomainsItem.

tools.name: domains_update
tools.description: Update an existing domain. Required: domain_id. Optional: capabilities, click_tracking, open_tracking (plus 2 more). Returns the updated UpdateDomainResponseSuccess.

params.name: capabilities
params.description: Configure the domain capabilities for sending and receiving emails. At least one capability must be enabled.

params.name: click_tracking
params.description: Track clicks within the body of each HTML email.

params.name: open_tracking
params.description: Track the open rate of each email.

params.name: tracking_subdomain
params.description: The subdomain to use for click and open tracking.

tools.name: domains_verify_create
tools.description: Triggers verification of the domain's DNS records including DKIM, SPF, and the tracking CNAME (if a tracking subdomain is configured). Required: domain_id. Returns the new VerifyDomainResponse.

tools.name: emails_create
tools.description: Send an email. Required: from, subject, to. Optional: attachments, bcc, cc (plus 8 more). Returns the new SendEmailResponse.

params.name: bcc
params.description: Bcc recipient email address. For multiple addresses, send as an array of strings.

params.name: cc
params.description: Cc recipient email address. For multiple addresses, send as an array of strings.

params.name: from
params.description: Sender email address. To include a friendly name, use the format 'Your Name <sender@domain.com>'.

params.name: headers
params.description: Custom headers to add to the email.

params.name: html
params.description: The HTML version of the message.

params.name: reply_to
params.description: Reply-to email address. For multiple addresses, send as an array of strings.

params.name: scheduled_at
params.description: Schedule email to be sent later. The date should be in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: text
params.description: The plain text version of the message.

params.name: to
params.description: Recipient email address. For multiple addresses, send as an array of strings. Max 50.

params.name: topic_id
params.description: The topic ID to scope the email to. If the recipient is a contact and opted-in to the topic, the email is sent. If opted-out, the email is not sent. If the recipient is not a contact, the email is sent if the topic's default subscription is opt_in.

tools.name: emails_create-batch
tools.description: Trigger up to 100 batch emails at once. Returns array of EmailsCreateBatchItem.

tools.name: emails_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single email. Required: email_id. Returns the Email.

tools.name: emails_get-receiving
tools.description: Retrieve a single received email. Required: email_id. Returns the GetReceivedEmailResponse.

params.name: email_id
params.description: The ID of the received email.

tools.name: emails_get-receiving-2
tools.description: Retrieve a list of attachments for a received email. Required: email_id. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of EmailsGetReceiving2Item.

params.name: email_id
params.description: The ID of the received email.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of attachments to return.

params.name: after
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results after this attachment ID. Cannot be used with 'before'.

params.name: before
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results before this attachment ID. Cannot be used with 'after'.

tools.name: emails_get-receiving-3
tools.description: Retrieve a single attachment for a received email. Required: email_id, attachment_id. Returns the RetrievedAttachment.

params.name: email_id
params.description: The ID of the received email.

tools.name: emails_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of emails. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of Email.

tools.name: emails_list-receiving
tools.description: Retrieve a list of received emails. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of EmailsListReceivingItem.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of received emails to return.

params.name: after
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results after this email ID. Cannot be used with 'before'.

params.name: before
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results before this email ID. Cannot be used with 'after'.

tools.name: emails_update
tools.description: Update a single email. Required: email_id. Returns the updated UpdateEmailOptions.

tools.name: emails_attachments_get
tools.description: Retrieve a list of attachments for a sent email. Required: email_id. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of AttachmentsGetItem.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of attachments to return.

params.name: after
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results after this attachment ID. Cannot be used with 'before'.

params.name: before
params.description: Pagination cursor to fetch results before this attachment ID. Cannot be used with 'after'.

tools.description: Retrieve a single attachment for a sent email. Required: email_id, attachment_id. Returns the RetrievedAttachment.

tools.name: emails_cancel_create
tools.description: Cancel the schedule of the e-mail. Required: email_id. Returns the new Email.

tools.name: events_create
tools.description: Create an event. Required: name. Optional: schema. Returns the new CreateEventResponse.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the event. Cannot start with the reserved `resend:` prefix.

params.name: schema
params.description: An optional flat key/type map defining the event payload schema. Supported types are `string`, `number`, `boolean`, and `date`.

tools.name: events_create-send
tools.description: Send an event. Required: event. Optional: contact_id, email, payload. Returns the new SendEventResponse.

params.name: contact_id
params.description: The ID of the contact to associate with this event. Exactly one of `contact_id` or `email` must be provided.

params.name: email
params.description: The email address to associate with this event. Exactly one of `contact_id` or `email` must be provided.

params.name: event
params.description: The name of the event to send.

params.name: payload
params.description: An optional payload of key/value pairs to include with the event.

tools.name: events_delete
tools.description: Delete an event. Required: identifier. Returns the RemoveEventResponse. Destructive.

params.name: identifier
params.description: The event ID (UUID) or event name.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single event. Required: identifier. Returns the Event.

params.name: identifier
params.description: The event ID (UUID) or event name.

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of events. Optional: limit, after, before. Returns array of EventSummary.

tools.name: events_update
tools.description: Update an event. Required: identifier, schema. Returns the updated UpdateEventResponse.

params.name: identifier
params.description: The event ID (UUID) or event name.

params.name: schema
params.description: A flat key/type map defining the event payload schema. Set to `null` to clear the schema. Supported types are `string`, `number`, `boolean`, and `date`.

tools.name: topics_create
tools.description: Create a new topic. Required: default_subscription, name. Optional: description, visibility (default: private). Returns the new CreateTopicResponseSuccess.

params.name: default_subscription
params.description: The default subscription status for the topic. Cannot be changed after creation.

params.name: description
params.description: A description of the topic. Max 200 characters.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the topic. Max 50 characters.

params.name: visibility
params.description: The visibility of the topic. Public topics are visible to all contacts on the unsubscribe page. Private topics are only visible to opted-in contacts.
